title: [App] Flamingo - Pair headset with charge case
scenario: Charge case battery indicator and DFU update option not shown for Voyager Legend 50 when paired via Charge Case
steps: 1. Ensure the Poly Voyager Legend 50 headset is paired with the Poly Studio Mobile app but NOT paired with the Charge Case.
2. Turn the headset OFF by pressing and holding the Power button.
3. Place the headset inside the Charge Case and close the case lid.
6. Remove the headset from the Charge Case.
7. Turn the headset ON by pressing and holding the Power button.
8. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the connected mobile device.
9. Verify the Home screen shows both the headset battery indicator and the Charge Case battery indicator.
10. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Settings → Software Update.
11. If a DFU (Device Firmware Update) is available, verify that an "Update all" button is displayed.
12. Verify that information about both the headset and the Charge Case is shown on the Software Update screen.
expected: After connecting to the app, both the headset battery indicator and the Charge Case battery indicator are displayed on the Home screen. On the Software Update screen (Settings → Software Update), if a DFU is available, an "Update all" button appears, and information about both the headset and the Charge Case is displayed.
